body.title: uurecall: fix literal search gaps + add palace source
body.result: Added palace search (memory_palace + adc.palace, token-AND ILIKE); suppressed semantic hits below 0.4 threshold; pre-existing ticket status bug was a non-issue (load_tasks returns all statuses)
body.intention: I intend that uurecall reliably surfaces everything we know about a search term — logs, tickets (all statuses), code, palace nodes — so it replaces ad-hoc grep rather than supplementing it.
body.description:
uurecall is supposed to be the single tool for 'everything you'd need to sort what we talked about for any search term' — code, past conversations, tickets, design decisions. Currently it fails at this: searching T-inference-proxy-mini-rack returned only 0.016-score semantic noise while grep found it instantly in CC.0 logs. Three concrete bugs identified:

1. **Ticket search misses by status** — design/triage/closed tickets may not be returned by load_tasks(); T-inference-proxy-mini-rack (status=design) was absent
2. **Semantic section shows garbage scores** — results at 0.016 are noise; they crowd out real hits and erode trust in the tool. Suppress results below a meaningful threshold (~0.4).
3. **Palace nodes not searched** — design decisions, architecture notes, rules nodes are invisible to uurecall. Should be a fifth source.

**Open design question (Q1):** Is the right fix a better single tool, or a template pattern — a uurecall dispatcher that routes to specialized flavors (uurecall-code, uurecall-design, uurecall-logs)? The argument for a single tool: user shouldn't have to know which flavor to call. The argument for templates: code search has different needs (git grep + symbol maps) than design search (palace + decisions log). This ticket takes the single-tool approach; if that proves wrong, the template refactor is a follow-on.

**Affected files:** `lab/claudecode/uurecall.py`

**Design rules:** no-sqlite (all DB reads via Postgres); palace search via memory_get/memory_search MCP tools or psql fallback

**Scope boundary:** IN: fix status filter in ticket search; suppress semantic hits below 0.4; add palace node search as fifth source. OUT: template/multi-command refactor (open question above); changing the uurecall command interface; adding new search sources beyond palace.

**Completion criteria:**
- `uurecall T-inference-proxy-mini-rack` returns the ticket in the Tickets section regardless of its status
- `uurecall T-inference-proxy-mini-rack` shows 0 semantic results with score < 0.4 (noise suppressed)
- `uurecall spreading activation` returns at least one palace node hit when relevant nodes exist
- `uurecall` on a literal string that grep finds in CC.0 logs also appears in the CC.0 logs section of uurecall output
